item.title: Version 1.5.2
item.description:
Lock Group Presets

Save, recall, and delete named sets of locked groups directly from the sort header.

  • Left-click the lock icon to filter the group list to show only locked groups.
  • Right-click the lock icon to save the current lock selection as a named preset, or recall a saved preset.
  • Presets persist across sessions and can be managed from the context menu.

Factory Theme Integrity

  • Factory theme files are now fully protected from save-back corruption — selecting a factory theme no longer overwrites other factory themes.
  • Fixed cross-contamination where applying a Default theme could propagate its state into unrelated factory themes via the edit history.
  • Classic factory themes (Ableton-prefixed) are now correctly routed to the factory group during backup and restore.

Navigation and Search

  • Full up/down arrow-key navigation across groups and parameters in the parameter list.
  • Shift-click to extend parameter selection ranges.
  • Fixed the Cmd-F color reverse-search Enter confirmation flow.

Tracks Subsystem

  • Isolate USER overrides with hue filter right-click subtract for targeted recoloring.
  • Show USER painted swatches with a color-reveal inset border for clear visual distinction.
  • Support for recursive color distribution across complex nested group topologies.
